message:
fix(security): continue hash and serialization hardening across engine modules

Further extends the content-hash tamper-evidence and safety work in four
additional modules:

- benchmark_evidence_bundle: bundle hash now includes full run fields
  (workload_id, duration_us, peak_memory_bytes, gc_pause_us, is_warmup,
  iteration) instead of just run_id, plus status, reference environment
  snapshot_hash, and environment_drifts
- deterministic_replay: replace 3 unwrap_or_default() on serialization
  with expect() in IncidentBundleBuilder (nondeterminism trace, failover
  records, divergences) — silently falling back to empty bytes in
  incident bundles would mask critical debugging data
- obligation_integration: sequence increment uses saturating_add for
  overflow safety (continuation of saturating arithmetic hardening)
- threshold_signing: include scoped_operations (BTreeSet, deterministic
  iteration) and zone in policy ID hash preimage to prevent cross-zone
  or cross-operation-scope hash collisions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
